laws.name: Integrated Coupling Excess
laws.definition: Phi-like normalized coupling is above block-preserving shuffle baseline over cumulative K, with elevated value at K=37.
laws.pass_criteria: phi_norm(37)>1 and min empirical p<0.05 with supported verdict

laws.name: Adjacent-Layer Conditional Structure
laws.definition: Cumulative adjacent conditional entropy profile shows non-trivial structure and control separation.
laws.pass_criteria: supported verdict with control-separated entropy profile (p<0.05)

laws.name: Cross-layer Synchronization Surplus
laws.definition: Synchronization proxy based on max-lag correlations exceeds shuffled/phase/random controls.
laws.pass_criteria: supported verdict and p<0.05 under primary control

laws.name: Variance-Entropy Collapse Pattern
laws.definition: Spectral entropy/top-variance cumulative profile exhibits structured collapse peaks rather than monotone triviality.
laws.pass_criteria: supported verdict and non-trivial collapse-score maxima with p<0.05

laws.name: Anchor Non-uniqueness
laws.definition: No single K universally dominates all metrics; anchors are distributed across multiple K bands.
laws.pass_criteria: joint readout indicates distributed anchors, not single-K lock-in
